payload.answer: Updated the Brain Slack agent MVP status to implemented; the prior planned/open status is superseded for this MVP milestone.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the Brain Slack agent MVP, which appears to be the implementation milestone for the existing Brain Slack agent project. It updates the prior planned/open status for the MVP without necessarily proving the entire Slack agent is fully complete.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.

details: Committed current status: Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.
Superseded prior planned/open status for the MVP milestone.
Did not infer that the entire Brain Slack agent beyond the MVP is complete.
